text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I thought I heard someone calling my name from
around here...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Could it have been one of my fans? Did I miss
them somehow?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Three Goddesses! Did you happen to
see anyone over here?
